record.field: # Find all POs that are overdue and not yet closed import datetime today_str = datetime.date.today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d') overdue_pos = env['purchase.order'].search([ ('rk_stage', 'not in', ['qc_cleared', 'inst_paid', 'closed']), ('rk_supply_due_date', '!=', False), ('rk_supply_due_date', '<', today_str), ('rk_is_overdue_supply', '=', True), ]) for po in overdue_pos: # Post a chatter message on the PO po.message_post( body='Supply overdue by %d day(s) (%d week(s)). Penalty accrued: ₹%.2f' % ( po.rk_delay_days, po.rk_delay_weeks, po.rk_supply_penalty_amount, ), subject='Supply Overdue Alert', message_type='comment', subtype_xmlid='mail.mt_note', )

# Find POs where institution payment is overdue import datetime claim_overdue = env['purchase.order'].search([ ('rk_stage', 'not in', ['po_received', 'forwarded', 'dispatched', 'closed']), ('rk_qc_date', '!=', False), ('rk_is_claim_overdue', '=', True), ('rk_inst_payment_date', '=', False), ]) for po in claim_overdue: po.message_post( body='Claim interest: Institution payment overdue by %d week(s). Interest accrued: ₹%.2f on bill amount ₹%.2f.' % ( po.rk_claim_overdue_weeks, po.rk_claim_interest_amount, po.rk_gross_amount_received or po.amount_total, ), subject='Claim Interest Accruing', message_type='comment', subtype_xmlid='mail.mt_note', )

import datetime today = datetime.date.today() alert_date = today + datetime.timedelta(days=60) today_str = today.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') alert_str = alert_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') expiring_rcs = env['rk.rc.agreement'].search([ ('status', '=', 'active'), ('rc_validity_date', '!=', False), ('rc_validity_date', '<=', alert_str), ('rc_validity_date', '>=', today_str), ]) for rc in expiring_rcs: days_left = (rc.rc_validity_date - today).days rc.message_post( body='RC validity expiring in %d day(s) on %s. Please initiate renewal with %s.' % ( days_left, rc.rc_validity_date, rc.vendor_id.name if rc.vendor_id else 'vendor', ), subject='RC Expiry Alert — %d days left' % days_left, message_type='comment', subtype_xmlid='mail.mt_note', )
